base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_eyes_returning — a character from 1980 pac man. Eyes-only sprite — shown when ghost is eaten. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Eyes-only sprite — shown when ghost is eaten; floats back to ghost-pen at high speed; respawns as normal ghost after pen re-entry
